pricing_readiness_columns.sql_string:
---- Columns pricing_readiness (1qbb4zv)
DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM (select
    research_area,
    use_case,
    primary_mart,
    status,
    mart_row_count,
    business_grain_rows,
    duplicate_like_rows,
    unknown_member_rows,
    min_business_date,
    max_business_date,
    analytical_scope,
    reporting_note
from greenplanetmart.reporting_readiness
where primary_mart = 'fct_sales_pricing'
) AS "inputQuery-Y2"

pricing_readiness_length.sql_string:
---- Length pricing_readiness (1qbb4zv)
SELECT COUNT(*) as rowCount FROM (SELECT * FROM (select
    research_area,
    use_case,
    primary_mart,
    status,
    mart_row_count,
    business_grain_rows,
    duplicate_like_rows,
    unknown_member_rows,
    min_business_date,
    max_business_date,
    analytical_scope,
    reporting_note
from greenplanetmart.reporting_readiness
where primary_mart = 'fct_sales_pricing'
) AS "inputQuery-Y2")
